form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start won by a nose at Port Macquarie Mdn-Sw March 24 over 1500m in soft going defeating Cool Summer Nights with 59kg at $4.40. The run before that rolled along in front then was edged out late 2nd in a small field at Coffs Harbour Mdn on March 9 over 1412m, on a wet track; 0.6 len behind Headstream carrying 59.5kg at $2.90. Can make it back-to-back wins.

Could add some value to wider exotics.
